title: [skopeo-sync doc] there is an error in skopeo/docs/skopeo-sync.1.md
body:
"TLS verification is normally enabled, and it can be disabled setting tls-verify to true."
Here the "true" should be false to disable TLS verification.

comments.body: Could you open a PR to make the change?

@rhatdan 
I see the doc has been change to correct, Please close the issue
